description: Create a two-column content slide on simplification and modernization with explanatory text and a horizontal bar chart showing benefits achieved from public cloud platforms/XaaS.

left.title: What key benefits has your organization achieved from using public cloud platforms/XaaS technologies over the past 12 months?

items.text: The Digital Operational Resilience Act in European markets and Australia’s Consumer Data Right are driving the need for cohesive, integrated digital infrastructure and modern architectures including auto-scaling, self-healing, and load balancing.

Technology simplification and modernization can improve productivity in technology delivery through adoption of public cloud platforms or XaaS technologies alongside DevSecOps tooling, practices, and controls.
Nearly one-third of respondents say that public cloud platforms or XaaS technologies have helped reduce both technology debt and total cost of ownership in their organizations.

Three key factors influencing investment decisions and transformation approach are: guidance from third parties (89%), in-house trials and proof of concept testing (88%), and previous adoption by competitors (78%).

The first and third factors suggest an appetite to learn from leaders in financial services and other sectors, especially among digital leaders using insights from experts, analysts, and technology vendors.
The second factor highlights that modernizing legacy technology toward a cloud-based, composable architecture requires careful planning and learning from prior successes and failures.

A sector perspective notes that many organizations are stuck halfway through transformation with results not justifying costs, while digital leaders are now focusing on finishing the transformation and applying lessons from past experiments to innovation.

footer.source: 7 https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/PDF/?uri=CELEX:52020PC0595&rid=10; 8 Source: Commonwealth of Australia, Consumer Data Right website.
